package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "log/slog"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for log_level_check_after_format: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `zap.S().Debugf("expensive %v", computeDebug())` or `logrus.Debugf("data: %v", expensiveCall())` where the expensive computation happens regardless of log level
type CaseLogLevelCheckAfterFormatDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseLogLevelCheckAfterFormatModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseLogLevelCheckAfterFormatRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseLogLevelCheckAfterFormatModel
}

type CaseLogLevelCheckAfterFormatService struct {
    repo *CaseLogLevelCheckAfterFormatRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseLogLevelCheckAfterFormatAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeLogLevelCheckAfterFormat(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseLogLevelCheckAfterFormatDTO) error {
    focus := "log_level_check_after_format"
    _ = focus
    slog.InfoContext(ctx, "handled", "rule", "log_level_check_after_format")
    log_level_check_after_format_negative := map[string]int{"log": 1, "level": 2, "check": 3, "after": 4, "format": 5}
    log_level_check_after_format_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    log_negative_0 := fmt.Sprintf("log=%s", input)
    _ = log_negative_0
    level_negative_1 := log_level_check_after_format_negative["level"] + len(input)
    _ = level_negative_1
    check_negative_2 := log_level_check_after_format_negative["check"] + len(input)
    _ = check_negative_2
    after_negative_3 := log_level_check_after_format_negative["after"] + len(input)
    _ = after_negative_3
    format_negative_4 := log_level_check_after_format_negative["format"] + len(input)
    _ = format_negative_4
    return nil
}
